mapper.sql: order_id, request_id, listing_id, goods_type, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, address_id_snapshot, receiver_name_snapshot, receiver_phone_snapshot, province_snapshot, city_snapshot, district_snapshot, detail_address_snapshot, postal_code_snapshot, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from market_order where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} for update
select from market_order where request_id = #{requestId} for update
select from market_order where buyer_user_id = #{buyerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time desc, order_id desc
select from market_order where seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time desc, order_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into market_order( order_id, request_id, listing_id, goods_type, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, address_id_snapshot, receiver_name_snapshot, receiver_phone_snapshot, province_snapshot, city_snapshot, district_snapshot, detail_address_snapshot, postal_code_snapshot ) values( #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{requestId}, #{listingId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{goodsType}, #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{buyerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{quantity}, #{unitPriceSnapshot}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryModeSnapshot}, #{listingTitleSnapshot}, #{status}, #{escrowTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{releaseTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{refundTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{autoConfirmAt}, #{addressIdSnapshot, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{receiverNameSnapshot}, #{receiverPhoneSnapshot}, #{provinceSnapshot}, #{citySnapshot}, #{districtSnapshot}, #{detailAddressSnapshot}, #{postalCodeSnapshot} )
mapper.update: update market_order set status = 'DELIVERED', auto_confirm_at = #{autoConfirmAt}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_order set status = 'SHIPPED', auto_confirm_at = #{autoConfirmAt}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}

update market_order set status = 'ESCROWED', escrow_txn_id = #{escrowTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ESCROW_PENDING'
update market_order set status = 'ESCROW_FAILED', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ESCROW_PENDING'
update market_order set status = 'RELEASE_PENDING', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status in ('DELIVERED', 'SHIPPED')

update market_order set status = 'COMPLETED', release_txn_id = #{releaseTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, auto_confirm_at = null, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status in ('RELEASE_PENDING', 'DISPUTE_RELEASE_PENDING')
update market_order set status = 'REFUND_PENDING', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ESCROWED'
update market_order set status = 'ESCROW_CANCEL_PENDING', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ESCROW_PENDING'

update market_order set status = 'REFUND_PENDING', escrow_txn_id = #{escrowTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ESCROW_CANCEL_PENDING'
update market_order set status = 'CANCELLED', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status in ('ESCROW_CANCEL_PENDING', 'ESCROW_FAILED')

update market_order set status = 'CANCELLED', refund_txn_id = #{refundTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'REFUND_PENDING'
update market_order set status = 'DISPUTE_REFUND_PENDING', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'DISPUTED'
update market_order set status = 'DISPUTE_RELEASE_PENDING', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'DISPUTED'

update market_order set status = 'REFUNDED', refund_txn_id = #{refundTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'DISPUTE_REFUND_PENDING'
update market_order set status = 'COMPLETED', release_txn_id = #{releaseTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_order set status = 'CANCELLED', refund_txn_id = #{refundTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_order set status = 'DISPUTED', update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_order set status = 'REFUNDED', refund_txn_id = #{refundTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_order set status = #{status}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}
mapper.select: select from market_order where status in ('DELIVERED', 'SHIPPED') and auto_confirm_at is not null and auto_confirm_at <= #{asOf} order by auto_confirm_at asc, order_id asc
